title: HR Talent Matching RAG
summary: Ground candidate-to-role matching on job requirements, resumes, and recruiter notes.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: HR Talent Matching RAG is positioned as a HRTech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Ground candidate-to-role matching on job requirements, resumes, and recruiter notes.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on hr, matching, rag.
